actionUnits.condition: OnSceneLoad (MonoBehaviour fileID 1907113015, guid e9315cd1bd0bb624886da5b1f92c045e) is configured exactly as provided: it subscribes to SceneManager.sceneLoaded in Awake and invokes OnLoad. The OnLoad UnityEvent has persistent m_Calls to TeleportPlayer.Teleport (target fileID 692630298) and FadeCanvas.StartFadeOut (target fileID 263574720). LoadScene (MonoBehaviour fileID 1907113017, guid 403efda511d335c4a865b0a1f33cc9e0) provides a no-parameter public method ReloadCurrentScene. Triggering ReloadCurrentScene will reload the active scene, causing SceneManager.sceneLoaded to fire, which calls OnSceneLoad.PlayEvent and invokes OnLoad, thus executing the persistent calls.
